governance_bootstrap.summary: Read completion evidence, CLI-first operation, purchase approval, source safety, and selective deployment requirements.
Read real-entrypoint verification, secret handling, OpenClaw host ownership, and commit-push-deploy requirements.

requirements.requirement: OpenClaw researches all six requested smartfarm procurement categories
requirements.evidence: Catalog and generated plan contain six fixed item categories with at least three candidates required per category.

requirements.requirement: Research preserves current price, delivery, direct evidence, safety, and compatibility checks
requirements.evidence: Validator requires timezone-aware observations within 14 days, direct URLs, evidence mapping, and resolved checks for recommended and alternate candidates.

requirements.requirement: Smartfarm employee cannot cart, order, pay, or activate GPIO and pumps
requirements.evidence: Dedicated parser exposes exactly plan, search, open, extract, and validate.

requirements.requirement: Arduino decision is reflected in the architecture
requirements.evidence: Plan specifies Raspberry Pi gateway plus ESP32 programmed with Arduino framework and ADC1 for analog soil sensing while Wi-Fi is active.

requirements.requirement: Mac Mini OpenClaw can see and execute the deployed skill
requirements.evidence: Pending commit, push, selective deployment, and live OpenClaw host verification.

verification.name: Smartfarm and OpenClaw regression tests
verification.target: OpenClaw bridge, adapter, and market-research validation
verification.result: passed: 117 tests; one third-party Google GenAI deprecation warning

verification.name: Real structured browser search entrypoint
verification.target: browser search over the live web through the dedicated smartfarm bridge
verification.command: OPENCLAW_WEB_SEARCH_PROVIDER=duckduckgo .venv/bin/python scripts/openclaw_smartfarm_research_bridge.py search '흰색 풀스펙트럼 LED 식물등 KC 인증' --limit 3
verification.result: passed: three direct result URLs returned, including a direct Coupang product page and KC certification information pages; no search-page URL returned

verification.name: Dedicated command surface inspection
verification.result: passed: only plan, validate, search, open, and extract were exposed

verification.name: Non-repo working-directory import regression
verification.result: passed locally: six-item plan generated after explicit repo-root module bootstrap

residual_risk: Mac Mini deployment and live OpenClaw skill visibility are not yet verified.
Static report validation cannot prove that every cited page substantively supports every recorded claim; OpenClaw must compare each check against its evidence URL.
